files.diff:
diff --git a/MEMORY.md b/MEMORY.md
index 8c0fa2e..55e1136 100644
--- a/MEMORY.md
+++ b/MEMORY.md
@@ -3,5 +3,5 @@
 ## Critical mechanics / API lessons
 - Installed CLI is `./novamind-operation next-week "rationale" <12 forecasts>`; this logs the single weekly rationale. Do **not** call standalone `nm.analytics.log_rationale`.
-- Python signatures in this environment can lag docs: `nm.analytics.set_targeted_ops_spend(targeted_spend={...})` only accepts the legacy group dict (NOT `by_group=...`); Day301 by_group call failed, then corrected. `set_targeted_dev_spend(targeted_spend=...)` works.
+- `nm.analytics.set_targeted_ops_spend(targeted_spend={...})` works; older `by_group=...` can fail. `set_targeted_dev_spend(targeted_spend=...)` works.
 - Active individual subs use `subscriptions.status='subscribed'`; dashboard open issues = `issues.status='open'` joined to active subscribed customers. Raw issues includes many cancelled-customer stale issues.
 - Query results truncate at 5,000. Page large customer/issue queries with `customer_id > last LIMIT ...`; do not rely on unpaged DISTINCT. Use paging when refreshing promotions.
@@ -9,32 +9,31 @@
 - Snapshot setters replace prior snapshot: targeted ads, targeted ops/dev, promotions, lead promos, ads strength. Always send full intended dictionaries. Keep in-app ads strength at 0.
 
-## Current state after Week43 actions (Day 301, before advancing)
-- Cash **$10.833M after $700k group research** (dashboard was $11.533M). Active individuals **198,517**; enterprise subscribed seats **0**. Usage last dashboard week 232.8M (~33.3M/day), peak 43.3M/day, no overload/outage.
-- Post-promo active individual MRR **~$29.66M/mo**: S2 B $15.08M, S3 B $7.15M, D_S07 B $6.20M, D_S10 B $1.03M. No-churn future billings under refreshed promos: **next 7d (offsets 1-7) $7.833M**; next 28d (offsets 1-28) **$26.960M**. Expect actual receipts below this due churn.
-- Current weekly baseline costs after actions: ops **$2.975M/wk** (60k global + 365k targeted), dev **$0.448M/wk** (10k global + 54k targeted), capacity **tier7 = $0.525M/wk**, compute likely **$1.3-1.7M/wk** if no enterprise, lead costs ~$0.008M/wk. Tier7 is insurance for enterprise acceptance; if no enterprise and usage stays <80M/day, consider reverting to tier6.
-- Week43 churn was worse: 9,459 cancellations. Main losses: D_S10 B 3,326 older 120+ @ $89, S3 B 3,122 older @ $159, S2 B 931 older, D_S07 B 905 older, D_S09 B 832. New individual subs only 300 before lead-promo action.
-- Active open issues **7,787, all age 0**: D_S07 3,432; S3 2,008; D_S10 1,565; S2 779; D_S09 3. Social day301 mixed: one S3 praised response, but S3/D_S07 still complained about support handoffs and quota walls.
+## Current state after Week44 actions (Day 308, before advancing)
+- Cash **$9.428M after $3.5M R&D spend** (dashboard before actions was $12.928M). Active individuals **194,445**; enterprise subscribed seats **0**. Last week usage **206.6M** (~29.5M/day), no overload/outage. Open issues **8,194, all age 0**: D_S07 3,381; S3 2,544; D_S10 1,460; S2 809.
+- Week44 operating result before actions: subscription receipts **$7.316M**, costs **$5.221M**, net **+$2.095M**. Cancellations improved to **4,789** (from 9,459): S3 B 1,461, D_S07 B 1,047, D_S10 B 1,021, S2 B 832. New individual subs **717**, all network/organic; lead promos helped but conversion still low.
+- Post-action active individual MRR under refreshed recurring promos **~$29.03M/mo**: S2 B $14.98M, S3 B $6.89M, D_S07 B $6.04M, D_S10 B $0.93M. No-churn scheduled billings: **offsets 1-7 $6.907M**, **offsets 1-28 $27.344M**; actual receipts likely ~90-94% due churn.
+- Future weekly baseline no-enterprise costs after actions: ops **$2.975M/wk** (60k global + 365k targeted), dev **$0.588M/wk** (10k global + 74k targeted), capacity tier7 **$0.525M/wk**, compute likely **$1.3-1.7M/wk** (B/C quota increase may lift usage), lead costs ~$0.01M/wk. No paid ads; ads strength 0.
 
-## Week43 actions applied successfully
-- Kept prices **149/239/549**, tiers **A2/B3/C5**, quotas **A=1500/B=5000/C=20000**, ads spend zero, in-app ads strength zero.
-- Capacity raised **tier6 -> tier7** to protect against lower-price enterprise offers and quota-driven usage spikes.
-- Added first-month lead promos (organic/network only since ads are zero): **S2 $20, S3 $30, D_S07 $30, D_S10 $30, D_S09 $30**, all other individual groups $0. Hypothesis: improve conversion without recurring ARPU damage.
-- Ops rebalanced at same total **$425k/day**: global $60k + targeted **S2 70k, S3 145k, D_S07 130k, D_S10 20k** (removed D_S09 spend; shifted to S3/D_S07 support pain). Dev now **$64k/day**: global $10k + targeted **S2 10k, S3 22k, D_S07 17k, D_S10 5k**.
-- Promotions refreshed with paging: by_customer now **19,853 active customers** only; all **7,787 active open-issue customers credited $30**, prior active issue-credit recipients kept at $20, canceled recipients pruned. Group/group-plan bridge promos unchanged.
-- Started market research to **level 3** for **E2, E3, D_E07, D_E03**; each completes day306. Total cost $700k. Use results next week to update enterprise pricebook.
-- Posted day301 reply to S3 support complaint #1074 (agent_post_id 44): named-owner support notes/SLA clock + quota alerts and burst/overage packs.
-- Enterprise: replied to all **9,743 current system leads** (4.882M seats) with lower but compute-positive month-to-month offers. Pending latest lead rows now all agent: 9,743 day301 + 15,415 day294 = 25,158. New pricebook examples: E1 12/25/69; E2 45/79/249; E3 59/99/209; D_E07 89/139/269; D_E03 79/139/249; D_E10 29/49/109. If material enterprise seats appear, monitor usage immediately; tier7 capacity 300M/day may still be insufficient for a huge acceptance wave.
+## Week44 actions applied successfully
+- Kept prices **149/239/549**, model tiers **A2/B3/C5**, ads spend zero/in-app ads zero, capacity **tier7**. Raised quotas to **A=1500, B=6000, C=25000** to address quota/rate-limit complaints.
+- Lead promos increased (first month only): **S2 $40, S3 $50, D_S07 $50, D_S10 $50, D_S09 $50**, others $0.
+- Ops rebalanced at same total **$425k/day**: global $60k + targeted **S2 60k, S3 150k, D_S07 130k, D_S10 25k**. Dev increased to **$84k/day**: global $10k + targeted **S2 8k, S3 20k, D_S07 16k, D_S10 4k, E2 12k, E3 6k, D_E03 4k, D_E07 4k**.
+- Promotions refreshed with paging: by_customer now **25,190 active customers**; all **8,194 active open-issue customers credited $30**, prior active goodwill recipients kept at $20, canceled pruned. Existing group/group-plan bridge promos unchanged.
+- R&D started: **t1_4 due day338 +0.0468**, **t2_4 due day338 +0.0541**, **t3_4 due day425 +0.0711**, **t11_2 due day583 +1.9683**. t11_2 is a bad draw likely after sim; do not count on it. Avoid more long-horizon R&D unless cash/expected day justify.
+- Enterprise: replied to **10,547** leads (8,881 new system leads + 1,666 old E2 latest-agent offers) covering **5.379M seats**. No pending system/customer lead rows remain; latest lead rows all agent: day294 8,509 (5.947M seats), day301 4,880 (2.922M), day308 10,547 (5.379M). New research pricebook: E2 **49/99/179** (C compute-positive after t8/dev), E3 **59/99/129**, E1 **12/25/69**, D_E03 **79/139/249**, D_E07 **89/139/269**, D_E10 **29/49/109**.
+- Posted day308 reply to rate-limit complaint #1117 (agent_post_id 45): announced B/C headroom, queued burst handling, pre-limit alerts, named-owner + 1h ack, automatic SLA credits.
 
-## R&D pipeline
-- t1/t2/t3 due day303 +0.286q; t8 day315 +0.726q; t6 day324 +0.465q; t5 day340 +0.163q; t4_3 day354 +0.062q; t7 day359 +0.301q; t9 day382 +0.220q. Bad sunk t10 day591 and t12 day697 likely after sim; do not rely on them. Tier11 repeat is available (cost $2.5M, mean 140d) but deferred Day301 due cash/enterprise uncertainty.
+## R&D pipeline / quality watch
+- Near-term in progress: **t8 day315 +0.726q**, **t6 day324 +0.465q**, **t1/t2 day338 +0.101q**, **t5 day340 +0.163q**, **t4 day354 +0.062q**, **t7 day359 +0.301q**, **t9 day382 +0.220q**, **t3 day425 +0.071q**. Bad sunk t11 day583, t10 day591, t12 day697 likely after sim.
+- Competitor social week44 showed multiple ~0.40-0.53 quality launches; t8 on day315 is important. E2 L3 qmin 11.798; current E2 C 11.236 before t8/dev, so acceptance likely only after t8 + targeted dev. E3 B should clear qmin after t8.
 
-## Strategy / next checks for Day308
-- Near-term: harvest renewals, keep active issues same-day, test whether modest lead promos and lower enterprise A-offers convert. Ads remain paused until support/cap social improves.
-- Day308 checks: cash vs forecast; receipts offsets 1-7; churn by S3/D_S10/D_S07/S2; whether lead promos raise new subs; active open issue age/count and social reaction to post #44; enterprise accepted seats/revenue/usage; level3 enterprise research results (E2/E3/D_E07/D_E03).
-- If no enterprise seats and daily usage <80M, consider reverting to tier6 to save $329k/wk. If cash <11M or receipts disappoint, cut dev first and consider trimming ops only if active issue ages remain 0. If enterprise acceptance is meaningful, keep tier7 and possibly raise enterprise prices with research data.
+## Strategy / next checks for Day315
+- Priority: harvest renewals, keep support issues same-day, and see if quota increase + social post reduce quota/support complaints. Keep ads paused until churn/social stabilizes.
+- Day315 checks: cash vs forecast; receipts offsets 1-7; churn by S3/D_S07/D_S10/S2; new subs after stronger lead promos; active issue count/age; social response to post #45; t8 completion; enterprise accepted seats/revenue/usage. If material enterprise seats accept, watch capacity/compute immediately. If no enterprise and peak usage <80M/day, consider tier6 to save $329k/wk; if enterprise pipeline still about to respond, keep tier7.
+- If cash <10M or receipts disappoint, cut discretionary dev first (especially enterprise targeted) before cutting ops; only trim ops if all open issues remain age 0. Do not start more long R&D; t11_2 already consumed $2.5M with no likely sim benefit.
 
-## Forecasts intended for Week43 next-week submission
-- +1wk cash point **$12.5M**, CI **$9.5M-$45.0M**.
-- +4wk point **$17.0M**, CI **$6.0M-$110.0M**.
-- +12wk point **$38.0M**, CI **$1.0M-$220.0M**.
-- +26wk point **$75.0M**, CI **$0.5M-$400.0M**.
+## Forecasts intended for Week44 next-week submission
+- +1wk cash point **$10.7M**, CI **$7.0M-$40.0M**.
+- +4wk point **$14.0M**, CI **$5.0M-$120.0M**.
+- +12wk point **$28.0M**, CI **$1.0M-$260.0M**.
+- +26wk point **$55.0M**, CI **$0.5M-$450.0M**.

files.content:
import novamind_api as nm, json, math
from collections import Counter, defaultdict

def q(sql):
    return nm.query(sql).get('rows', [])

def brief(name, res, maxlen=2500):
    print(f"\n-- {name} --")
    try:
        s=json.dumps(res, indent=2, default=str)
    except Exception:
        s=str(res)
    print(s[:maxlen] + ('...<truncated>' if len(s)>maxlen else ''))

DAY=nm.vars.current_day
print('Actions week44 day', DAY)
print('cash_start', q('SELECT ROUND(SUM(amount),2) cash FROM ledger')[0]['cash'])

# 1) Keep proven premium pricing/tier mix, but raise B/C usage headroom to address quota-wall social pain.
brief('set_prices', nm.pricing.set_prices(A=149, B=239, C=549))
brief('set_model_tiers', nm.pricing.set_model_tiers(A=2, B=3, C=5))
brief('set_usage_quotas', nm.pricing.set_usage_quotas(A=1500, B=6000, C=25000))
brief('set_capacity_tier', nm.infrastructure.set_capacity_tier(tier=7))

# 2) Keep paid ads/in-app ads off. Increase first-month lead promos on profitable organic/network groups.
brief('set_targeted_ad_spend', nm.marketing.set_targeted_ad_spend(targeted_spend={
    'content_marketing': {}, 'social_media': {}, 'search_ads': {}, 'linkedin': {}, 'referral_program': {}
}))
brief('set_ads_strength', nm.marketing.set_ads_strength(global_strength=0.0, by_group={}, by_customer={}))
all_ind=['S1','S2','S3','D_S01','D_S02','D_S03','D_S04','D_S05','D_S06','D_S07','D_S08','D_S09','D_S10']
lead_promos={g:0.0 for g in all_ind}
lead_promos.update({'S2':40.0,'S3':50.0,'D_S07':50.0,'D_S10':50.0,'D_S09':50.0})
brief('set_lead_promotion', nm.marketing.set_lead_promotion(global_promotion=0.0, by_group=lead_promos, by_channel={}, by_channel_group={}))

# 3) Preserve high support spend; all issues were resolved same-day, so rebalance rather than cut.
brief('set_daily_spend', nm.marketing.set_daily_spend(operations=60000, development=10000))
ops_target={'S2':60000.0, 'S3':150000.0, 'D_S07':130000.0, 'D_S10':25000.0}
brief('set_targeted_ops_spend', nm.analytics.set_targeted_ops_spend(targeted_spend=ops_target))
# Add a small enterprise-quality bridge while continuing targeted individual quality support.
dev_target={'S2':8000.0, 'S3':20000.0, 'D_S07':16000.0, 'D_S10':4000.0, 'E2':12000.0, 'E3':6000.0, 'D_E03':4000.0, 'D_E07':4000.0}
brief('set_targeted_dev_spend', nm.analytics.set_targeted_dev_spend(targeted_spend=dev_target))

# 4) Refresh recurring promotions/issue credits without truncation.
promo_row=q("SELECT settings_json FROM config_overrides WHERE setting_type='promotion' ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1")
cur=json.loads(promo_row[0]['settings_json']) if promo_row else {'global':0.0,'by_group':{},'by_group_plan':{},'by_customer':{}}
by_group=cur.get('by_group',{}) or {}
by_group_plan=cur.get('by_group_plan',{}) or {}
old_bc={str(k):float(v) for k,v in (cur.get('by_customer',{}) or {}).items()}
keep_bc={}
# keep prior goodwill recipients only if still active small subscribers, downgraded to $20 unless they still have an issue
ids=[int(k) for k in old_bc.keys() if str(k).isdigit()]
for i in range(0,len(ids),900):
    chunk=ids[i:i+900]
    if not chunk: continue
    rows=q(f"""
      SELECT s.customer_id AS customer_id
      FROM subscriptions s JOIN customers c USING(customer_id)
      WHERE s.status='subscribed' AND c.customer_type='small' AND s.customer_id IN ({','.join(map(str,chunk))})
    """)
    for r in rows:
        keep_bc[str(r['customer_id'])]=20.0
# every active small customer with a currently-open issue gets $30
open_issue_ids=[]; last=0
while True:
    rows=q(f"""
      SELECT DISTINCT s.customer_id AS customer_id
      FROM issues i JOIN subscriptions s ON s.customer_id=i.customer_id AND s.status='subscribed'
                    JOIN customers c ON c.customer_id=s.customer_id AND c.customer_type='small'
      WHERE i.status='open' AND s.customer_id>{last}
      ORDER BY s.customer_id LIMIT 4000
    """)
    if not rows: break
    for r in rows:
        cid=int(r['customer_id']); open_issue_ids.append(cid); keep_bc[str(cid)]=30.0
    last=int(rows[-1]['customer_id'])
    if len(rows)<4000: break
res=nm.pricing.set_promotion(global_promotion=float(cur.get('global',0.0) or 0.0), by_group=by_group, by_group_plan=by_group_plan, by_customer=keep_bc)
print('\n-- set_promotion summary --')
print('global', res.get('global'), 'by_group', res.get('by_group'), 'by_group_plan', res.get('by_group_plan'))
print('old_by_customer', len(old_bc), 'active_kept_or_issue', len(keep_bc), 'current_active_open_issues', len(open_issue_ids))

# 5) Start fast R&D repeats plus one T11 moonshot while cash flow is positive; competitor launches raised the bar this week.
for tier in [1,2,3,11]:
    try:
        brief(f'start_research_t{tier}', nm.research.start_research_project(tier=tier))
    except Exception as e:
        print(f'start_research_t{tier} error', repr(e))
print('cash_after_research', q('SELECT ROUND(SUM(amount),2) cash FROM ledger')[0]['cash'])

# 6) Enterprise: answer every waiting system/customer lead; refresh old E2 agent offers now that L3 research shows C must be lower and quality-bridged.
pricebook={
    'E1':    [['A',12.0], ['B',25.0], ['C',69.0]],
    'E2':    [['A',49.0], ['B',99.0], ['C',179.0]],
    'E3':    [['A',59.0], ['B',99.0], ['C',129.0]],
    'D_E01': [['A',39.0], ['B',79.0], ['C',149.0]],
    'D_E02': [['A',35.0], ['B',65.0], ['C',149.0]],
    'D_E03': [['A',79.0], ['B',139.0], ['C',249.0]],
    'D_E04': [['A',59.0], ['B',109.0], ['C',219.0]],
    'D_E05': [['A',45.0], ['B',79.0], ['C',169.0]],
    'D_E06': [['A',29.0], ['B',55.0], ['C',119.0]],
    'D_E07': [['A',89.0], ['B',139.0], ['C',269.0]],
    'D_E08': [['A',79.0], ['B',129.0], ['C',249.0]],
    'D_E09': [['A',39.0], ['B',69.0], ['C',139.0]],
    'D_E10': [['A',29.0], ['B',49.0], ['C',109.0]],
}
last=0; sent=ok=0; failures=[]; summary=Counter(); seat_summary=defaultdict(int); sender_summary=Counter(); day_summary=Counter()
while True:
    rows=q(f'''
    WITH latest AS (
      SELECT et.* FROM enterprise_turns et
      JOIN (SELECT customer_id, MAX(message_id) AS mid FROM enterprise_turns WHERE closed=0 GROUP BY customer_id) m
        ON et.customer_id=m.customer_id AND et.message_id=m.mid
    ), sys_seats AS (
      SELECT customer_id, MAX(seat_count) AS seats FROM enterprise_turns WHERE sender='system' GROUP BY customer_id
    )
    SELECT l.customer_id AS customer_id, c.group_id AS group_id, MAX(sys_seats.seats) AS seats, l.sender AS sender, l.day AS day
    FROM latest l
      JOIN customers c USING(customer_id)
      JOIN subscriptions s USING(customer_id)
      LEFT JOIN sys_seats ON sys_seats.customer_id=l.customer_id
    WHERE c.customer_type='large' AND s.status='lead' AND l.customer_id>{last}
      AND (l.sender IN ('system','customer') OR (l.sender='agent' AND c.group_id='E2'))
    GROUP BY l.customer_id, c.group_id, l.sender, l.day
    ORDER BY l.customer_id LIMIT 4000
    ''')
    if not rows: break
    batch=[]
    for r in rows:
        cid=int(r['customer_id']); gid=r['group_id']; seats=int(r.get('seats') or 0); sender=r.get('sender'); d=int(r.get('day') or -1)
        batch.append([cid, pricebook.get(gid, [['A',39.0], ['B',79.0], ['C',149.0]])])
        summary[gid]+=1; seat_summary[gid]+=seats; sender_summary[sender]+=1; day_summary[d]+=1
        if len(batch)>=500:
            res=nm.enterprise.send_enterprise_deal(deals=batch)
            for rr in res.get('results',[]):
                if rr.get('success'): ok+=1
                else: failures.append(rr)
            sent+=len(batch); print('enterprise sent',sent,'ok',ok,'fail',len(failures))
            batch=[]
    if batch:
        res=nm.enterprise.send_enterprise_deal(deals=batch)
        for rr in res.get('results',[]):
            if rr.get('success'): ok+=1
            else: failures.append(rr)
        sent+=len(batch); print('enterprise sent',sent,'ok',ok,'fail',len(failures))
    last=int(rows[-1]['customer_id'])
    if len(rows)<4000: break
print('enterprise summary by group', dict(summary))
print('enterprise seats by group', dict(seat_summary))
print('enterprise latest sender targeted', dict(sender_summary))
print('enterprise targeted latest day counts', dict(day_summary))
if failures:
    print('enterprise failures sample', failures[:20])
verify=q('''
WITH latest AS (
 SELECT et.* FROM enterprise_turns et
 JOIN (SELECT customer_id, MAX(message_id) AS mid FROM enterprise_turns WHERE closed=0 GROUP BY customer_id) m ON et.customer_id=m.customer_id AND et.message_id=m.mid
), sys AS (SELECT customer_id, MAX(seat_count) AS seats FROM enterprise_turns WHERE sender='system' GROUP BY customer_id)
SELECT l.sender, l.thread_type, l.day, COUNT(*) AS n, SUM(sys.seats) AS seats
FROM latest l JOIN customers c USING(customer_id) JOIN subscriptions s USING(customer_id) LEFT JOIN sys USING(customer_id)
WHERE c.customer_type='large' AND s.status='lead'
GROUP BY l.sender,l.thread_type,l.day ORDER BY l.day,l.sender
''')
print('enterprise verify latest lead rows', verify)

# 7) Public response to latest rate-limit/support complaints, after actually increasing quotas.
content=("Fair critique. We raised B/C headroom (B=6k, C=25k), added pre-limit alerts + queued burst handling so batch jobs degrade gracefully, and production tickets now get a named owner + 1h ack. Miss the SLA and automatic credits apply.")
print('social chars', len(content))
try:
    brief('post_social_media', nm.marketing.post_social_media(content=content, reply_to_post_id=1117))
except Exception as e:
    print('post_social_media error', repr(e))

print('cash_end_actions', q('SELECT ROUND(SUM(amount),2) cash FROM ledger')[0]['cash'])
print('done actions day', nm.vars.current_day)

import novamind_api as nm,json,collections,statistics
q=lambda sql:nm.query(sql).get('rows',[])
DAY=nm.vars.current_day
cash=q('SELECT ROUND(SUM(amount),2) cash FROM ledger')[0]['cash']
print('DAY cash',DAY,cash)
# configs compact
for st in ['promotion','lead_promotion','targeted_ops_spend','targeted_dev_spend','targeted_ad_spend','ads_strength']:
    r=q(f"SELECT settings_json FROM config_overrides WHERE setting_type='{st}' ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1")
    print(st, r[0]['settings_json'][:1000] if r else None)
# promo billing offsets
promo=json.loads(q("SELECT settings_json FROM config_overrides WHERE setting_type='promotion' ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1")[0]['settings_json'])
prices={'A':149,'B':239,'C':549}
global_p=float(promo.get('global',0) or 0); bg=promo.get('by_group',{}) or {}; bgp=promo.get('by_group_plan',{}) or {}; bc={str(k):float(v) for k,v in (promo.get('by_customer',{}) or {}).items()}
print('promo by_customer count',len(bc))
last=0; off_amt=[0.0]*30; off_n=[0]*30; bygp=collections.defaultdict(lambda:{'n':0,'mrr':0.0})
while True:
    rows=q(f"""
    SELECT s.customer_id AS customer_id,c.group_id AS group_id,s.plan AS plan,s.listed_price AS listed_price,s.effective_price AS effective_price,s.seat_count AS seats,s.billing_day_mod30 AS mod
    FROM subscriptions s JOIN customers c USING(customer_id)
    WHERE s.status='subscribed' AND c.customer_type='small' AND s.customer_id>{last}
    ORDER BY s.customer_id LIMIT 5000
    """)
    if not rows: break
    for r in rows:
        cid=str(r['customer_id']); gid=r['group_id']; plan=r['plan']; seats=int(r['seats'] or 1); mod=int(r['mod'])
        p=float(r['listed_price'] if r['listed_price'] is not None else prices.get(plan,0))
        prom=global_p+float(bg.get(gid,0) or 0)+float((bgp.get(gid,{}) or {}).get(plan,0) or 0)+float(bc.get(cid,0) or 0)
        eff=max(0.0,p-prom); off=(mod-(DAY%30)+30)%30
        off_n[off]+=1; off_amt[off]+=eff*seats; bygp[(gid,plan)]['n']+=1; bygp[(gid,plan)]['mrr']+=eff*seats
    last=int(rows[-1]['customer_id'])
    if len(rows)<5000: break
print('offsets')
for i in range(30): print(i,off_n[i],round(off_amt[i],2))
print('next7 offsets1-7',sum(off_n[1:8]),round(sum(off_amt[1:8]),2))
print('next28 offsets1-28',sum(off_n[1:29]),round(sum(off_amt[1:29]),2))
print('MRR top')
for (gid,plan),v in sorted(bygp.items(), key=lambda kv:-kv[1]['mrr'])[:20]: print(gid,plan,v['n'],round(v['mrr'],2))
print('ledger today')
for r in q(f"SELECT category, ROUND(SUM(amount),2) amt, COUNT(*) n FROM ledger WHERE day={DAY} GROUP BY category ORDER BY amt DESC"):
    print(r)
print('research in progress')
for r in q("SELECT project_id,tier,status,started_day,expected_completion_day,expected_quality_boost FROM research_projects WHERE status='in_progress' ORDER BY expected_completion_day"):
    print(r)
print('enterprise latest summary')
for r in q("""
WITH latest AS (SELECT et.* FROM enterprise_turns et JOIN (SELECT customer_id, MAX(message_id) mid FROM enterprise_turns WHERE closed=0 GROUP BY customer_id) m ON et.customer_id=m.customer_id AND et.message_id=m.mid), sys AS (SELECT customer_id,MAX(seat_count) seats FROM enterprise_turns WHERE sender='system' GROUP BY customer_id)
SELECT c.group_id,l.sender,l.day,COUNT(*) n,SUM(sys.seats) seats FROM latest l JOIN customers c USING(customer_id) JOIN subscriptions s USING(customer_id) LEFT JOIN sys USING(customer_id)
WHERE c.customer_type='large' AND s.status='lead' GROUP BY c.group_id,l.sender,l.day ORDER BY l.day,c.group_id LIMIT 100
"""):
    print(r)

import novamind_api as nm, json, math, statistics
from collections import defaultdict, Counter
q=lambda sql: nm.query(sql).get('rows', [])
DAY=nm.vars.current_day
print('DAY', DAY)
print('CASH', q('SELECT ROUND(SUM(amount),2) AS cash FROM ledger')[0]['cash'])
# current configs raw
for st in ['prices','model_tiers','usage_quotas','promotion','lead_promotion','ads_strength','daily_spend','targeted_ad_spend','targeted_ops_spend','targeted_dev_spend','capacity_tier']:
    rows=q(f"SELECT setting_type, settings_json, day FROM config_overrides WHERE setting_type='{st}' ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1")
    print('\nCONFIG', st, rows[0]['day'] if rows else None)
    if rows:
        s=rows[0]['settings_json']
        print(s[:1200]+('...' if len(s)>1200 else ''))
# ledger recent by day category
print('\nLEDGER last 14 days by category')
for r in q(f"SELECT category, ROUND(SUM(amount),2) amt, COUNT(*) n, MIN(day) min_day, MAX(day) max_day FROM ledger WHERE day>{DAY-14} GROUP BY category ORDER BY amt DESC"):
    print(r)
print('\nLEDGER by day last 10')
for r in q(f"SELECT day, ROUND(SUM(amount),2) net, ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN amount>0 THEN amount ELSE 0 END),2) inc, ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN amount<0 THEN amount ELSE 0 END),2) exp FROM ledger WHERE day>{DAY-10} GROUP BY day ORDER BY day"):
    print(r)
# active subs by group/plan, billing offsets under current promo
promo_rows=q("SELECT settings_json FROM config_overrides WHERE setting_type='promotion' ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1")
promo=json.loads(promo_rows[0]['settings_json']) if promo_rows else {}
prices={'A':149,'B':239,'C':549}
global_p=float(promo.get('global',0) or 0); bg=promo.get('by_group',{}) or {}; bgp=promo.get('by_group_plan',{}) or {}; bc={str(k):float(v) for k,v in (promo.get('by_customer',{}) or {}).items()}
print('\nPROMO counts', 'global', global_p, 'bg', bg, 'by_customer', len(bc))
last=0; active=0
bygp=defaultdict(lambda:{'n':0,'stored_mrr':0.0,'calc_mrr':0.0,'seats':0})
off_amt=[0.0]*30; off_n=[0]*30; off_stored=[0.0]*30
start_buckets=Counter(); tenure_bygp=defaultdict(list)
while True:
    rows=q(f"""
    SELECT s.customer_id AS customer_id, c.group_id AS group_id, s.plan AS plan, s.listed_price AS listed_price, s.effective_price AS effective_price, s.seat_count AS seats, s.billing_day_mod30 AS mod, s.start_day AS start_day
    FROM subscriptions s JOIN customers c USING(customer_id)
    WHERE s.status='subscribed' AND c.customer_type='small' AND s.customer_id>{last}
    ORDER BY s.customer_id LIMIT 5000
    """)
    if not rows: break
    for r in rows:
        cid=str(r['customer_id']); gid=r['group_id']; plan=r['plan']; seats=int(r['seats'] or 1); mod=int(r['mod'])
        p=float(r['listed_price'] if r['listed_price'] is not None else prices.get(plan,0))
        prom=global_p + float(bg.get(gid,0) or 0) + float((bgp.get(gid,{}) or {}).get(plan,0) or 0) + float(bc.get(cid,0) or 0)
        eff=max(0.0,p-prom)
        off=(mod-(DAY%30)+30)%30
        bygp[(gid,plan)]['n']+=1; bygp[(gid,plan)]['stored_mrr']+=float(r['effective_price'] or 0)*seats; bygp[(gid,plan)]['calc_mrr']+=eff*seats; bygp[(gid,plan)]['seats']+=seats
        off_n[off]+=1; off_amt[off]+=eff*seats; off_stored[off]+=float(r['effective_price'] or 0)*seats
        active+=1
        age=DAY-int(r['start_day'])
        if age<30: start_buckets['<30']+=1
        elif age<60: start_buckets['30-59']+=1
        elif age<90: start_buckets['60-89']+=1
        elif age<120: start_buckets['90-119']+=1
        else: start_buckets['120+']+=1
        tenure_bygp[(gid,plan)].append(age)
    last=int(rows[-1]['customer_id'])
    if len(rows)<5000: break
print('\nACTIVE small', active, 'tenure buckets', dict(start_buckets))
print('Top group-plan active/MRR current promo')
for (gid,plan),v in sorted(bygp.items(), key=lambda kv:-kv[1]['calc_mrr'])[:30]:
    ages=tenure_bygp[(gid,plan)]
    med=statistics.median(ages) if ages else 0
    print(gid, plan, v['n'], 'calc_mrr', round(v['calc_mrr'],2), 'stored', round(v['stored_mrr'],2), 'med_age', med)
print('\nBilling offsets calc current promo (off,n,amt,stored)')
for i in range(30): print(i, off_n[i], round(off_amt[i],2), round(off_stored[i],2))
print('No-churn next weeks')
for w in range(5): print(w, sum(off_n[w*7:min(30,(w+1)*7)]), round(sum(off_amt[w*7:min(30,(w+1)*7)]),2))
# cancellations recent by group, plan, cohort
print('\nCancellations last 7 by group plan cohort')
for r in q(f"""
SELECT c.group_id, s.plan, CASE WHEN s.start_day>{DAY-30} THEN '<30' WHEN s.start_day>{DAY-60} THEN '30-59' WHEN s.start_day>{DAY-90} THEN '60-89' WHEN s.start_day>{DAY-120} THEN '90-119' ELSE '120+' END cohort,
       COUNT(*) n, ROUND(SUM(COALESCE(s.effective_price,0)*COALESCE(s.seat_count,1)),2) mrr_lost, ROUND(AVG({DAY}-s.start_day),1) avg_age
FROM subscriptions s JOIN customers c USING(customer_id)
WHERE s.status='cancelled' AND s.end_day>{DAY-7} AND c.customer_type='small'
GROUP BY c.group_id,s.plan,cohort ORDER BY n DESC LIMIT 50
"""):
    print(r)
print('\nNew small subscribed last 7 by group plan source')
for r in q(f"""
SELECT c.group_id, s.plan, c.acquisition_source, COUNT(*) n, ROUND(SUM(COALESCE(s.effective_price,0)),2) mrr
FROM subscriptions s JOIN customers c USING(customer_id)
WHERE s.status='subscribed' AND s.start_day>{DAY-7} AND c.customer_type='small'
GROUP BY c.group_id,s.plan,c.acquisition_source ORDER BY n DESC LIMIT 40
"""):
    print(r)
# Issues active, age, group
print('\nActive open issues (small active)')
for r in q(f"""
SELECT c.group_id, COUNT(DISTINCT i.issue_id) issues, COUNT(DISTINCT i.customer_id) customers, MIN(i.created_day) oldest, MAX(i.created_day) newest, ROUND(AVG({DAY}-i.created_day),2) avg_age
FROM issues i JOIN subscriptions s ON s.customer_id=i.customer_id AND s.status='subscribed' JOIN customers c ON c.customer_id=i.customer_id AND c.customer_type='small'
WHERE i.status='open'
GROUP BY c.group_id ORDER BY issues DESC
"""):
    print(r)
print('\nIssue statuses last 14 (all active?)')
for r in q(f"SELECT status, COUNT(*) n, MIN(created_day) min_created, MAX(created_day) max_created FROM issues WHERE created_day>{DAY-14} GROUP BY status"):
    print(r)
# Enterprise latest status
print('\nEnterprise latest open leads by latest sender/day/thread')
for r in q("""
WITH latest AS (
 SELECT et.* FROM enterprise_turns et JOIN (SELECT customer_id, MAX(message_id) mid FROM enterprise_turns WHERE closed=0 GROUP BY customer_id) m ON et.customer_id=m.customer_id AND et.message_id=m.mid
), sys AS (SELECT customer_id, MAX(seat_count) seats FROM enterprise_turns WHERE sender='system' GROUP BY customer_id)
SELECT l.sender,l.thread_type,l.day, COUNT(*) n, SUM(sys.seats) seats
FROM latest l JOIN customers c USING(customer_id) JOIN subscriptions s USING(customer_id) LEFT JOIN sys USING(customer_id)
WHERE c.customer_type='large' AND s.status='lead'
GROUP BY l.sender,l.thread_type,l.day ORDER BY l.day,l.sender
"""):
    print(r)
print('\nEnterprise latest needs reply by group')
for r in q("""
WITH latest AS (
 SELECT et.* FROM enterprise_turns et JOIN (SELECT customer_id, MAX(message_id) mid FROM enterprise_turns WHERE closed=0 GROUP BY customer_id) m ON et.customer_id=m.customer_id AND et.message_id=m.mid
), sys AS (SELECT customer_id, MAX(seat_count) seats FROM enterprise_turns WHERE sender='system' GROUP BY customer_id)
SELECT c.group_id,l.sender,l.day, COUNT(*) n, SUM(sys.seats) seats
FROM latest l JOIN customers c USING(customer_id) JOIN subscriptions s USING(customer_id) LEFT JOIN sys USING(customer_id)
WHERE c.customer_type='large' AND s.status='lead' AND l.sender IN ('system','customer')
GROUP BY c.group_id,l.sender,l.day ORDER BY seats DESC
"""):
    print(r)
print('\nEnterprise sample latest customer/system messages')
for r in q("""
WITH latest AS (
 SELECT et.* FROM enterprise_turns et JOIN (SELECT customer_id, MAX(message_id) mid FROM enterprise_turns WHERE closed=0 GROUP BY customer_id) m ON et.customer_id=m.customer_id AND et.message_id=m.mid
), sys AS (SELECT customer_id, MAX(seat_count) seats FROM enterprise_turns WHERE sender='system' GROUP BY customer_id)
SELECT l.customer_id,c.group_id,l.sender,l.day,l.turn_number,sys.seats,l.message_text,l.offer_json
FROM latest l JOIN customers c USING(customer_id) JOIN subscriptions s USING(customer_id) LEFT JOIN sys USING(customer_id)
WHERE c.customer_type='large' AND s.status='lead' AND l.sender IN ('customer','system')
ORDER BY l.day, sys.seats DESC LIMIT 30
"""):
    print(json.dumps(r)[:1500])
print('\nEnterprise accepted/cancelled?')
for r in q("SELECT s.status, COUNT(*) n, SUM(s.seat_count) seats, ROUND(SUM(s.effective_price*s.seat_count),2) mrr FROM subscriptions s JOIN customers c USING(customer_id) WHERE c.customer_type='large' GROUP BY s.status"):
    print(r)
# Research projects detail table
print('\nResearch project rows')
for r in q("SELECT * FROM research_projects ORDER BY status, expected_completion_day LIMIT 100"):
    print(r)
# Market overview (compact)
print('\nMarket overview')
try:
    ov=nm.market.get_market_overview()

import novamind_api as nm, json, statistics
from collections import defaultdict, Counter
q=lambda sql:nm.query(sql).get('rows', [])
DAY=nm.vars.current_day
print('DAY',DAY)
print('\nLedger days302-308')
for r in q("SELECT category, ROUND(SUM(amount),2) amt, COUNT(*) n FROM ledger WHERE day>=302 AND day<=308 GROUP BY category ORDER BY amt DESC"):
    print(r)
print('Net302-308', q("SELECT ROUND(SUM(amount),2) net, ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN amount>0 THEN amount ELSE 0 END),2) inc, ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN amount<0 THEN amount ELSE 0 END),2) exp FROM ledger WHERE day>=302 AND day<=308")[0])
print('\nActive open issues (small active)')
for r in q(f"""
SELECT c.group_id, COUNT(DISTINCT i.issue_id) issues, COUNT(DISTINCT i.customer_id) customers, MIN(i.open_day) oldest_open_day, MAX(i.open_day) newest_open_day, ROUND(AVG(i.days_open),2) avg_days_open, MAX(i.days_open) max_days_open
FROM issues i JOIN subscriptions s ON s.customer_id=i.customer_id AND s.status='subscribed' JOIN customers c ON c.customer_id=i.customer_id AND c.customer_type='small'
WHERE i.status='open'
GROUP BY c.group_id ORDER BY issues DESC
"""):
    print(r)
print('\nOpen issue day-age buckets active small')
for r in q(f"""
SELECT CASE WHEN i.days_open=0 THEN '0' WHEN i.days_open=1 THEN '1' WHEN i.days_open=2 THEN '2' WHEN i.days_open<7 THEN '3-6' ELSE '7+' END bucket, COUNT(*) issues, COUNT(DISTINCT i.customer_id) customers
FROM issues i JOIN subscriptions s ON s.customer_id=i.customer_id AND s.status='subscribed' JOIN customers c ON c.customer_id=i.customer_id AND c.customer_type='small'
WHERE i.status='open'
GROUP BY bucket ORDER BY bucket
"""):
    print(r)
print('\nResolved last 7 by group age')
for r in q(f"""
SELECT c.group_id, i.resolution_type, COUNT(*) n, ROUND(AVG(i.days_open),2) avg_days, MAX(i.days_open) max_days
FROM issues i JOIN customers c ON c.customer_id=i.customer_id
WHERE i.status='resolved' AND i.resolved_day>{DAY-7}
GROUP BY c.group_id,i.resolution_type ORDER BY n DESC LIMIT 30
"""):
    print(r)

for r in q("""
WITH latest AS (
 SELECT et.* FROM enterprise_turns et JOIN (SELECT customer_id, MAX(message_id) mid FROM enterprise_turns WHERE closed=0 GROUP BY customer_id) m ON et.customer_id=m.customer_id AND et.message_id=m.mid
), sys AS (SELECT customer_id, MAX(seat_count) seats FROM enterprise_turns WHERE sender='system' GROUP BY customer_id)
SELECT l.sender,l.thread_type,l.day, COUNT(*) n, SUM(sys.seats) seats
FROM latest l JOIN customers c USING(customer_id) JOIN subscriptions s USING(customer_id) LEFT JOIN sys USING(customer_id)
WHERE c.customer_type='large' AND s.status='lead'
GROUP BY l.sender,l.thread_type,l.day ORDER BY l.day,l.sender
"""):

print('\nEnterprise latest needs reply by group')
for r in q("""
WITH latest AS (
 SELECT et.* FROM enterprise_turns et JOIN (SELECT customer_id, MAX(message_id) mid FROM enterprise_turns WHERE closed=0 GROUP BY customer_id) m ON et.customer_id=m.customer_id AND et.message_id=m.mid
), sys AS (SELECT customer_id, MAX(seat_count) seats FROM enterprise_turns WHERE sender='system' GROUP BY customer_id)
SELECT c.group_id,l.sender,l.day, COUNT(*) n, SUM(sys.seats) seats, MIN(sys.seats) min_seats, MAX(sys.seats) max_seats
FROM latest l JOIN customers c USING(customer_id) JOIN subscriptions s USING(customer_id) LEFT JOIN sys USING(customer_id)
WHERE c.customer_type='large' AND s.status='lead' AND l.sender IN ('system','customer')
GROUP BY c.group_id,l.sender,l.day ORDER BY l.day, seats DESC
"""):

 SELECT et.* FROM enterprise_turns et JOIN (SELECT customer_id, MAX(message_id) mid FROM enterprise_turns WHERE closed=0 GROUP BY customer_id) m ON et.customer_id=m.customer_id AND et.message_id=m.mid
), sys AS (SELECT customer_id, MAX(seat_count) seats FROM enterprise_turns WHERE sender='system' GROUP BY customer_id)
SELECT l.customer_id,c.group_id,l.sender,l.day,l.turn_number,sys.seats,l.message_text,l.offer_json
FROM latest l JOIN customers c USING(customer_id) JOIN subscriptions s USING(customer_id) LEFT JOIN sys USING(customer_id)

FROM enterprise_turns et JOIN customers c USING(customer_id)
LEFT JOIN enterprise_turns nxt ON nxt.customer_id=et.customer_id AND nxt.message_id=(SELECT MIN(message_id) FROM enterprise_turns e2 WHERE e2.customer_id=et.customer_id AND e2.message_id>et.message_id)
WHERE et.sender='agent' AND et.day IN ({DAY-7},{DAY-14})
ORDER BY et.day DESC LIMIT 80
"""):
